## Environment

- **OS**: (e.g. macOS 26.2)
- **CPU**: (e.g. Apple M1)
- **Compiler**: (e.g. Apple clang 17.0.0)
- **Protobuf version**: (e.g. libprotoc 34.0)
- **FlatBuffers version**: (e.g. 25.12.19)
- **zstd version**: (e.g. 1.5.7)

## Block / Experiment

Which Block is producing unexpected results?  
(e.g. Block C — Django AST benchmark)

```
Paste the table row or value from SPPS_Complete_Terminal_Output.txt
```

```
Paste your terminal output
```

